## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss process improvements and role expectations for Sulaman's new position at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sulaman identified critical improvements needed in Airtable-to-Looker Studio workflow, proposing standardized SOPs and a new UI tool](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Andi fully supports Sulaman's initiative to improve processes, encouraging him to take on any opportunities he sees fit](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [KPIs for Sulaman's role will focus on problem-solving, unblocking teams, and improving content publishing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Linear dashboard will be set up to track Sulaman's tasks and capacity across various problem-solving areas](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

## Topics

### Airtable and Looker Studio Process Improvements

  - [Current process: Bulk export of all tables/clients, leading to potential issues (e.g., out of space, junk data)](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Sulaman's solution: New UI tool allowing selective export of specific tables/columns](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Benefits: Increased control, reduced risk of dashboard downtime, improved efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Challenge: Getting teams to adopt a unified Airtable template (currently facing pushback)](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### Scope of Sulaman's Role

  - [Encouraged to suggest improvements, even if seemingly out of scope](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Broad skill set allows for picking up tasks across publishing and other areas](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Main goal: Unblock teams, ensure content managers focus on content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [KPIs will include content published, tickets resolved, and overall efficiency improvements](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Reporting and Visibility

  - [Sulaman to assist with Looker dashboards and potentially other reporting areas](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Aim to provide better visibility into reporting processes](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Success metrics: Decreasing ticket resolution time, increasing content production and publishing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Communication and Collaboration

  - [Importance of stakeholder communication emphasized (e.g., coordinating with Kirkland and Dave on Airtable improvements)](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Sulaman to create a short demo for Dave regarding the new tool](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Encouraged to understand overall client onboarding procedures and inter-team dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up Linear dashboard to track Sulaman's tasks and capacity](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Sulaman to finalize the Airtable-to-Looker Studio tool](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Kirkland on Monday to discuss Airtable improvements](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Create and share demo video with Dave about the new tool](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Sulaman to continue learning about overall procedures and team dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/QLfpLgHdvDGsbQDUqD_7bHfdYy6e4aZ1?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - Follow up with Marilia regarding specific onboarding questions
